visa_types.name: Family reunification
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance)
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements - D visa (in person) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/e13968843f01539ed23ba05f11fa7c6b/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)
visa_types.visa_fees:
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process. 

[Table:   Family reunification]
Appointments for the Extended visa type  is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available  not earlier than 21 daysPlease Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website 
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process. 
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center 
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.
visa_types.processing_time:
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)
visa_types.forms:
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identity Malta agency. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for Family Reunification category, you must get your Family reunification certificate approved by Identity Malta agency. Click here (https://online.vfsevisa.com/mt/en/login) to begin the approval process for Family Reunion certificate.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Visa Fees
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process. 

[Table:   Family reunification]
Appointments for the Extended visa type  is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available  not earlier than 21 daysPlease Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website 
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process. 
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center 
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.

## Documents Required
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/mlt/travel-insurance)
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements - D visa (in person) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5gnOMS5nZJxdjWRBNf8rBH/e13968843f01539ed23ba05f11fa7c6b/Checklist-Extended-Service-family-reunification.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/russia/english/pdf/photo_specifications.pdf) for the photo specification

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Employment Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator (https://identita.gov.mt/public-registry-sec-page-translators-list/)

1.  Click here for the Checklist (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/russia/english/pdf/List-of-Required-Documents-EMPLOYMENT-VISA-2025.pdf)
*The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. Visa must be applied for within the first 60 days of the issuance of the AIP letter. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months).
2. Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
3. Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
4. Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
If you have not purchased, please click here.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.visa_fees:
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process.

[Table:   Employment Visa]
Appointments for the Extended visa type is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available not earlier than 21 days
Please Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.

Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The extended service allows applicants wishing to apply for an Employment visa to book an appointment, for processing their application directly through the Central Visa Unit within Identita, Malta.
Important Note: Incomplete applications will not be accepted over the counter.

## Visa Fees
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center. Ensure you use a card with international payments enabled to pay the visa fee during the appointment booking process.

[Table:   Employment Visa]
Appointments for the Extended visa type is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available not earlier than 21 days
Please Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.

## Documents Required
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator (https://identita.gov.mt/public-registry-sec-page-translators-list/)

1.  Click here for the Checklist (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/russia/english/pdf/List-of-Required-Documents-EMPLOYMENT-VISA-2025.pdf)
*The applicant shall ensure that prior to applying for an appointment on the online appointment portal for D-Visa Processing, a valid Approval in Principle (AIP) letter issued by Identita, Malta is in hand. Visa must be applied for within the first 60 days of the issuance of the AIP letter. Any AIP letters which are deemed to have expired on the date of appointment shall not be accepted and as such it will not be possible for the applicant to proceed with the booked appointment. Any applicable fees paid at application stage are non-refundable. As per the instruction received from Identita, Malta, VFS Centers will not accept any application without the Identita, Malta Original work permit
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months).
2. Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
3. Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
4. Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
If you have not purchased, please click here.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/russia/english/pdf/photo_specifications.pdf) for the photo specification

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Study
visa_types.documents_required:
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator (https://identita.gov.mt/public-registry-sec-page-translators-list/) 
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:
Visa Requirements -Study D visa
- Completed and signed visa application form duly filled in English.
- One recent passport photo according to ICAO standard, white background; must be recent (not older than 6 months)
- Original passport and copy of Valid Travel Document (should be valid for at least 8 months). Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa.
2. Confirmed Accommodation Reservation
3. Confirmed air ticket/s. If ticket is presented, a copy is retained.
4. Health Insurance acceptable in the Schengen Area (minimum coverage has to be 30,000 Euros) and which should cover the period of validity of visa.
5. Policy for the Recognition of Foreign Public Documents (https://identita.gov.mt/public-registry-sec-page-policy-for-the-recognition-of-foreign-public-documents/) 
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Long Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
A national “D” visa allows you to enter Malta in order to apply for a residence permit. It can be issued for a set of reasons (i.e. work, studies, training, etc.) and has a long-stay validity for a maximum of one year. Holders of national visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Long Stay Visa categories
Employment
Visa Student
Family Reunification
visa_types.full_text:
A national “D” visa allows you to enter Malta in order to apply for a residence permit. It can be issued for a set of reasons (i.e. work, studies, training, etc.) and has a long-stay validity for a maximum of one year. Holders of national visa have the obligation to apply for a residence permit to Malta immediately after their first entry to the country.
Long Stay Visa categories
Employment
Visa Student
Family Reunification

visa_types.visa_fees:
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All VFS Fee will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees are non-refundable

[Table:   Other]
Appointments for the Extended visa type is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available not earlier than 21 days
 
Please Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website (if applicable for the Visa type)
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.
visa_types.processing_time:
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Please note that before applying for an appointment for “Other” category, please read through the correct checklist and keep your documents ready for your appointment. 
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## VISA FEES
There is an additional service charge equivalent in local currency per application over and above the visa fees payable by all applicants. Please refer to this document (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6nCLQSGQzYypDA7Q0SjGbO/ef0052bfd13937f8cf454b0154cb9d69/other-fees.pdf) for all applicable charges.
You will pay the visa fee when booking the appointment on the VFS website and the VFS service fee at the application center.
All VFS Fee will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card)
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- All fees are non-refundable

[Table:   Other]
Appointments for the Extended visa type is available within 72 hours. Appointments for the Standard visa is available not earlier than 21 days
 
Please Note:
- The VISA Fees must be paid when booking your appointment on the VFS website (if applicable for the Visa type)
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge for each application at the visa application center during application process.
- The VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card at the application center
- The VFS Service Fee is Non-Refundable. Visa Fees paid upon appointment booking for a Long-stay visa are not refundable, regardless of the circumstances, including the voluntary withdrawal, failure to appear for the appointment or refusal of the said application.

## Documents Required
Dear applicants, please pay attention to the fact that presence of children from 6 up to 12 years old at submission counters is mandatory!
Dear applicants, please be advised that all documents must be submitted in English or accompanied by a certified English translation from an approved translator
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, Please click here
Please ensure all the documents are submitted as per the below checklist:

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SEASONAL WORKERS
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR ADOPTION VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5crbFcmL1v4on2oVI9Xz9p/3c3919dec0328c21e98fa8b731d8e3d9/Documentation-required-for-adoption-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR BUSINESS VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7t3NmDGznsyipPBdLFuu50/49b8c9d2d251352fe22b4d2bf53dd731/Documentation-required-for-business-visas-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CITIZENSHIP/RESIDENCE PROGRAMMES (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2aeuO6mWzdIn5RquqvVvez/c39582756db5a4703e1067247c2721eb/Documentation-required-for-citizenship-residence-programmes-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR COURT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4bAGqx2GUFHrJDtThN7aSs/53fb934f9bb6381de2b6c8d27272948a/Documentation-required-for-court-visa-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR CULTURAL VISIT VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/75y5RAytmH0SP8hHt4Hr9Q/7c486f518c411c71f1a94cff7a7ca6e7/Documentation-required-for-cultural-visit-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SPORT ACTIVITIES VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79LENP0idVJSOPK1QYZ7In/564a3eb00595afaeff45e98411b3fec3/Document-required-for-Sport-Activites-Visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR FAMILY MEMBERS (SPOUSE – WIFE/HUSBAND/REGISTERED PARTNER) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4iqDtU9LTwgsBzjnCLE65z/07245583bd581c2f6d59399f9c426e9a/List-of-Required-Documents-Spouse-Children-related-to-EU-_more-than-90_-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR HUMANITARIAN VISA

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR MEDICAL VISAS (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bUUcOUgosbyJGRrL851jA/53fae7db53083bb0aa17851999bb420a/Documentation-required-for-medical-visas-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR OFFICIAL/POLITICAL VISA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/27pKxRNS3PhWJHE7nxE7Kl/ce574c4fc1dfb85e03da754529475d79/Documentation-required-for-offical-political-visa-new.pdf)

DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR LOST DOCUMENTS TO RE-ENTER MALTA (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mDyxvZlfHRAxM9lfRAq4d/1295c9acadcf94f82edd51143b0f76ac/Documentation-required-Lost-Documents-to-re-enter-Malta-new.pdf)
DOCUMENTATION REQUIRED FOR Sports Trials

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification while they submit their application.
Click here (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta-extended-services/russia/english/pdf/photo_specifications.pdf) for the photo specification

## Processing Time
Click here (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/OVMz2fDVFo4HOHOD9+ZsS2aHQ5OzxnlPZonjofTOFmXYjYZNB/WcybRu22/pkuUnPy3m9t88oUBEcQpT0qRopVJU9MCU6qsx82CKbm6/fuq) to your application with Identity Malta Agency online. Use the Reference Number present on the invoice/receipt issued by the Visa Application Centre along with your date of birth to access this service.
Kindly note that long stay visa applications for Malta require a minimum of 6 to 8 weeks of processing time. Therefore, please ensure that you begin the application process well in advance of your travel to Malta. For additional information on the status of your application please contact the Central visa unit helpdesk visit https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa (https://identita.gov.mt/central-visa-unit-national-visa-long-stay-visa) or e-mail visa.identita@govt.mt (mailto:visa.identita@govt.mt)

## Download Forms
The application form for Malta can be downloaded from the below link.
Please note that handwritten application forms are not accepted. You must complete the application form on your computer and print it out and sign for document submission.
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43e41PbeizSTg2B4g27fOg/286ae7feb6063df06124351fd25641ad/National-D-Visa-Application-April-2025.pdf) 
Declaration of Proof (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4FgbKGvMG3koVU8Q1P9n86/e284e9ee83205a37f7942c744815665b/declaration-of-proof.pdf)
To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
